publishedAbstract: When performing a CNS deployment, the process fails with the following error: Creating node ip-nn-nnn-nn-nnn.xxx.internal... ID: nxnnnnxxnxxxnnxnnnxnnnxnnxnnxnnn Adding device /dev/xxx... Unable to add device: Unable to execute command on glusterfs-storage-xxxxxx: Device /dev/xxx excluded by a filter.
publishedTitle: CNS deployment fails: Device excluded by a filter.
